title: Call for Proposals – Nidhi Prayas 2025 & BioNEST Call-2
summary: Active calls for proposals: Nidhi Prayas 2025 (DST grant up to ₹10 lakh) and BioNEST Call-2 (BIRAC/DBT MedTech incubation).
body:
IC IITP currently has two active calls for proposals:

**1. Nidhi Prayas 2025 (DST)**
Prototype grant up to ₹10 lakh for innovators in Agriculture, Healthcare, Clean Tech, Energy, Water, IoT, and Industry 4.0. Duration 12–18 months. Download the application form and email to nidhiprayas.ic@iitp.ac.in.

**2. BioNEST Call for Proposals – 2 (BIRAC/DBT)**
BioTech and MedTech startups can apply for dedicated incubation space, lab access, and grant linkages in the BioNEST wing. Download the application form and submit to the BioNEST programme manager.
